title: Algerian Lamb Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew originating from Algeria, slow-cooked in a clay pot with aromatic spices and tender lamb.

ingredients.name: Algerian tagine spice mix
ingredients.notes: Available at North African markets or online

instructions: Heat oil in a clay pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add tagine spice mix, tomato paste, chicken broth, and lamb broth (if using).
Stir to combine and bring to a simmer.
Transfer the pot to the oven and cook for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in honey and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with olives and herbs (if desired).
